lastStrategyDecision.reason: Evidence is low-conviction for automated intraday execution: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 provides no participation edge, averageGapPercent is negative (-0.88%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~48.75 is only moderate (higher slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~21.05 is weak (lower follow-through probability). While uptrendShare is decent (0.6) and all candidates are fresh, overall quality does not justify allocating meaningful risk. Maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP framework with bracket exits, but observe/rank only until RVOL, liquidity, and catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
